🆕 New Post (Published: July 1, 2026)

Public Wi-Fi (Hanno Free Wi-Fi) Service Resumed

The public Wi-Fi service (Hanno Free Wi-Fi) at Hanno Civic Activity Center, which ended on March 31, 2026 (Reiwa 8), has resumed operation.

Service Resumption Date: July 1, 2026 (Reiwa 8)

For connection instructions and usage notes, please check the link below.

Public Wi-Fi (Hanno Free Wi-Fi) Details

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/shiminseikatsubu/jitishinkoka/shiminkatudou/13785.html
summary: ℹ️ Hanno Civic Activity Center Public Wi-Fi (Hanno Free Wi-Fi) Service Resumed
